original_text: on midnight while traveling to tuljapur we discovered a check light of tpms sensor even after checking tyre pressure the check light didnt switch off on i rushed to sudarshan tata service centre bhiwandi for the same i got my car serviced same day on my brand new tata curvv purchased on 30th november it is deeply alarming and unacceptable that a vehicle which is less than days old has already suffered a complete breakdown on 20th december while travelling with my family including children in lonavala the vehicle suddenly failed to start and displayed a dca fault warning as a result my entire family was stranded on the roadside for nearly hours waiting for assistance from tata motors roadside assistance this incident was extremely distressing unsafe and humiliating especially with children present what worsened the situation was the highly delayed and unsatisfactory response from the rsa team which is unacceptable for a brand new vehicle under warranty the car has now been shifted to the nearest authorized tata motors service center however i wish to clearly state that i am not willing to accept repeated repairs temporary fixes or assurances for a vehicle that has failed within days of purchase a complete breakdown due to a dca fault in a day old car strongly indicates a manufacturing or critical system defect such an incident has completely eroded my trust in the safety and reliability of this vehicle

original_text: dear tata motors team i am writing this with deep disappointment as a loyal tata customer until today i have always felt proud to own and drive a tata car however my recent experience has left me extremely concerned i own a tata altroz model and for the second time within a single year i am facing a fuel tank leakage issue the fuel tank was already replaced once and despite the replacement being done within months the same defect has reoccurred this clearly raises serious concerns about the quality and durability of the fuel tank used in this model what is more disheartening is that the service centre is now denying free replacement even though this is a repeated manufacturing related issue i am also aware that several other tata altroz owners who purchased the model are facing similar fuel tank leakage problems indicating that this may not be an isolated case but a broader quality concern fuel tank leakage is a critical safety issue and it is extremely important for tata motors to prioritize fuel tank quality and customer safety over replacement costs a recurring fault of this nature significantly impacts customer trust and confidence in the brand

repeated breakdowns multiple part changes significant out of pocket expense loss of time disruption to my official duties in the armed forces and ongoing mental distress tata motors must now either replace the vehicle with an equivalent new vehicle or refund the full purchase price plus all consequential costs and losses this is my final opportunity to have tata resolve this matter amicably chronology of defects and service attempts march may drive modes repeatedly disabled while travelling first failure on route gwalior jaipur vehicle taken to roshan tata motors godam and later velocity tata motors gwalior service centres performed repeated dpf engine regeneration procedures but the fault recurred within km i visited service centres approximately times problem persisted during these visits service personnel ultimately advised that a sensor wiring was damaged i doubt whether the wiring was originally damaged or tampered with while in their custody a sensor had to be procured through insurance delivery was delayed and incorrect parts were initially supplied to allow urgent travel i was given a used sensor taken from another vehicle the vehicle ran km and then the same drive mode fault recurred pune multiple visits to panchjanya automobile warje for the same recurring fault identical temporary remedies were applied and the fault returned oct vehicle battery drained while idle rsa jumpstart obtained service centre replaced battery in december on their recommendation without clear root cause diagnosis battery failures continued despite normal usage july aug rsa jumpstarts required in delhi sagar tata motors charged rs for servicing and diagnostics addressing battery drain fault recurred within a month sc later found current leakage and purportedly rectified it oct vehicle would not start rsa jumpstart called again oct vehicle retained

translated_text: amway offers the amway car wash concentrated liquid an economical phosphate free cleaning solution that safely deep cleans vehicle exteriors and restores their shine without harming the polish

original_text: product details and benefits the amway car wash is a highly concentrated formula designed specifically for painted glossy surfaces of automobiles and vehicles deep cleaning it contains special wetting agents that improve water penetration to gently loosen and lift surface dirt and grime safe on paint the formula is designed to clean effectively without affecting the existing surface sheen protective polish or finish economical and concentrated a ml bottle is highly concentrated with just ml about a quarter capful mixed with liters of water being sufficient for one wash offering up to uses per bottle environmentally conscious it is phosphate free meaning it does not contribute to algae growth in lakes rivers and streams user reviews users on platforms like flipkart praise the product for providing a good cleaning finish with little effort and note that the vehicle's shine lasts a long time after use
translated_text: product details and benefits the amway car wash is a highly concentrated formula designed specifically for painted glossy surfaces of automobiles and vehicles deep cleaning it contains special wetting agents that improve water penetration to gently loosen and lift surface dirt and grime safe on paint the formula is designed to clean effectively without affecting the existing surface sheen protective polish or finish economical and concentrated a ml bottle is highly concentrated with just ml about a quarter capful mixed with liters of water being sufficient for one wash offering up to uses per bottle environmentally conscious it is phosphate free meaning it does not contribute to algae growth in lakes rivers and streams user reviews users on platforms like flipkart praise the product for providing a good cleaning finish with little effort and note that the vehicle's shine lasts a long time after use

original_text: how to use according to the instructions provided by amway on their product pages the process is straightforward dust your car with a dry cloth to remove loose dirt mix ml ¼ capful of the amway car wash concentrated liquid into liters of water in a bucket wash the car using this solution with a soft cloth or sponge rinse the vehicle thoroughly with clean water dry the car with a fresh and clean cloth for a streak free finish note do not use the amway car wash concentrated liquid for cleaning car interiors

original_text: sharing my disappointing experience with tata curvv ev and after sales support i wanted to share my recent experience with my tata curvv ev so that others are aware before making their decision i bought the curvv ev with high expectations as it looks great and has impressive specs on paper but my real life experience has been extremely disappointing recently my car started showing a motor temperature high error even after being parked for nearly hours the vehicle became completely unusable i immediately contacted the tata rsa team and that s where the real struggle began initially the rsa team assured me that a towing van would arrive within one hour after waiting and calling again the representative on the other end suddenly started shouting at me accusing me of abusing the towing van driver which is completely false i never received a single call from the towing driver in the first place after multiple follow ups and wasted hours the car was finally picked up much later than promised it has now been at the service center for two days and no one is responding or providing any proper update on the issue this entire experience has left me questioning tata s after sales service communication and professionalism customers invest their trust and hard earned money and this kind of treatment is unacceptable especially for a premium ev like the curvv i genuinely hope tata motors takes feedback like this seriously and improves both their rsa response and service support system has anyone else faced similar issues with tata evs would love to hear your experiences

original_text: i am from a lower middle class background and i have a deep liking for tata tata feels like ours and whenever i think about buying a car in the future my first thought is always tata in fact i feel strongly that i should not buy anything other than a tata car however when i look at the designs of your passenger cars i often feel confused whether to admire them or to laugh at them compared to hyundai and suzuki tata cars have fewer options and even among them the designs don t feel modern enough or updated to match the current generation s expectations for example if i compare hyundai creta maruti suzuki brezza and hyundai venue with tata s lineup the only comparable car is nexon if someone doesn t like the nexon what other options do you give them tata punch and nexon both have a rough and tough look but where is a car with a classy professional appearance tiago and altroz though nice look too small almost like matchboxes i don t understand what your design team is doing in today s highly competitive market people expect multiple options but tata seems to behave as though customers must choose only from the limited four cars available the mentality of india s middle class is changing they don t just want small cars like tiago or altroz they want at least mid sized vehicles like venue creta or brezza i sincerely suggest you conduct more research talk to people and understand what type of designs and cars they prefer then update your models accordingly otherwise many like me who are loyal to tata may be forced to switch to hyundai or suzuki still i thank tata motors and your wonderful team for your dedication i truly wish to see tata leading with stylish modern and competitive cars in the passenger segment

original_text: double entry bookkeeping also known as double entry accounting is a method of bookkeeping that relies on a two sided accounting entry to maintain financial information every entry into an account requires a corresponding and opposite entry into a different account the double entry system has two equal and corresponding sides known as debit and credit this is based on the fundamental accounting principle that for every debit there must be an equal and opposite credit a transaction in double entry bookkeeping always affects at least two accounts always includes at least one debit and one credit and always has total debits and total credits that are equal the purpose of double entry bookkeeping is to allow the detection of financial errors and fraud

original_text: great ad by the way but about build quality and service of your cars my three months of tata punch ev experience have been nothing short of a nightmare the charging sessions would intermittently stop and each time i had to restart them by either opening the car door or refreshing the app when i first reported this issue they checked and said it was just a software glitch that had been corrected assuring me it wouldn t happen again but the issue persisted the very next day when i put it on charge once again i took the car to the service center and they said there was no problem with charging claiming it didn t stop however when i checked the app i noticed that charging had stopped seven times during that single session i wonder how the people at the service center failed to notice that they asked me to share my app data information they should already have had only after that did they agree there was a problem and start checking it it s been days now and every day when i call for updates they just say they ve made some changes it feels like they are working purely on a trial and error basis they have absolutely no clue what s happening it seems they are playing guessing games and using customers cars for training honestly i don t even think the people at the service center are qualified just producing cars and advertising them is not enough for a company like tata it must ensure smooth after sales service as well if you can t provide effective after sales service you shouldn t position yourself as a leading company in evs if your own service team cannot understand or resolve the issue how are we supposed to trust your technology it raises a fundamental question if you don t know how to repair your car why did you build it in the first place

original_text: based on my experience i find that tata spare parts lack reliability when compared to other brands tata vehicles tend to have higher maintenance costs a higher frequency of part replacements elevated labor charges and expensive spare parts offering minimal discounts does not significantly alleviate these costs for customers furthermore i have observed that service advisors are often unable to provide clear and satisfactory explanations for issues encountered with the car in many cases they attribute problems to manufacturing defects or known issues which are then expected to be resolved at the customer s expense it appears that the service center does not take accountability for these recurring problems the responses provided are often ambiguous and seem designed to confuse customers rather than address their concerns transparently additionally i would like clarification on why each part replacement incurs a separate labor charge even when a single mechanic can handle multiple repairs and replacements i urge tata motors to acknowledge and address the reliability issues associated with its spare parts to enhance customer trust and satisfaction
